function.name: textfile_access
function.description: Performs local file system operations on text files: list, read, write, append. All operations restricted to the scope of an opaque configured base path.

cmd.description: File operation to perform. 'list' returns files in 'path' sorted with most recently modified at the top. All other cmds work on a single file.

path.description: The relative path on which to perform cmd.

max.description: For 'list' only, optional max number of files to return. Not present or 0 implies all.

contents.description: For 'write' and 'append' only, text content to write.
